title: Simple portal frame analysis
description_for_llm: Linear elastic (Theory I) analysis of a portal style frame of columns and beams with moment carrying joints. Use for one or few storey rigid frames built from straight line members. Assumptions: member axes are straight curves in metres, column bases fixed or pinned per the template, rigid beam to column connections, one steel section for all members, static vertical loads plus self weight. Limits: no second order (P-Delta) effects, so slender sway frames are underchecked; no wind or seismic load case; no connection design. NOT YET AUDITED: the GHX has no ALMOND_IN_*/ALMOND_OUT_* harness params, so run_definition will refuse it. Retrieval context only until harnessed.

inputs.name: ALMOND_IN_LINES
inputs.description: Frame member axis curves (columns and beams), node-merged at joints.

inputs.name: ALMOND_IN_LOAD_KN
inputs.description: Vertical load applied at the beam level per the template layout.

outputs.name: ALMOND_OUT_DISP_MM
outputs.description: Largest nodal displacement in the model.

outputs.name: ALMOND_OUT_UTIL
outputs.description: Utilization ratio per element, 1.0 means at capacity.

outputs.name: ALMOND_OUT_MASS_KG
outputs.description: Total structural mass of the model.
